glp1Prescriptions.note: NHS prescriptions for GLP-1 weight loss drugs (Ozempic/Wegovy/Mounjaro) in England

bariatricWaitTime.note: Average wait time for NHS bariatric surgery from referral to operation

sources.name: NHS England
sources.dataset: Referral to Treatment statistics — bariatric surgery

sources.name: NHS Digital
sources.dataset: Health Survey for England — adult obesity

metadata.methodology: GLP-1 prescriptions counted from NHSBSA Prescription Cost Analysis data for semaglutide, liraglutide and tirzepatide weight-management licensed preparations. Bariatric surgery wait times from NHS RTT incomplete pathways data. Obesity prevalence from Health Survey for England self-reported height and weight measurements.
knownIssues: GLP-1 prescriptions include both diabetes and weight-loss indications prior to 2023 licensing changes — figures adjusted where possible
2020 obesity prevalence affected by Health Survey suspension during COVID-19
Bariatric surgery volumes fell sharply in 2020–21 due to theatre cancellations
